---
title: "Photos — 2026"
---

A few snapshots from the Lodge. (Drop image files into `2026/photos/` and add
them to the gallery below.)

::: {layout-ncol=3}
![Registration desk](photos/placeholder.svg){group="2026"}

![Keynote session](photos/placeholder.svg){group="2026"}

![Conference dinner](photos/placeholder.svg){group="2026"}

![Harbour walk](photos/placeholder.svg){group="2026"}

![Poster session](photos/placeholder.svg){group="2026"}

![Closing panel](photos/placeholder.svg){group="2026"}
:::
